creator: john@saltant.com
text:
Note that as of a few hours ago both bug 223439 and bug 223450 have exceeded the three month maintainer timeout threshold after which the maintainer is considered AWOL and may be replaced per [0].

Kurt, I would consider taking on maintainership, though it would probably be better if you did.

[0] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en/books/porters-handbook/makefile-maintainer.html
